title: cordylanthus littoralis
intro: Cordylanthus littoralis, also known as the beach plumewort or coastal cordylanthus, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the coastal regions of California in the United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Cordylanthus littoralis can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential uses.
